title: Bloodlines and Old Hatred
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows King Harald, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Nami, Unknown person #6, Rocks D. Xebec as Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.
scene: Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Hey!! If it isn't the rat king!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Came to kill me in person, huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: afraid ya got the wrong guy. I've never even met the man.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I believe promises are meant to be kept...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That is precisely why your wretched iLK must be expunged from the emails of history!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Rocks!! That crazy bastard!! He's going after Saint Saturn!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What now, rear Admiral?! Should we provide back up?!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Who exactly are you backing up!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The Pirates are taking the treasure!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Stop them!! Those are world- renowned items!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Things are getting pretty crazy! FUHE HE.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We're ready to go, Captain John!!

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: This is goodbye then, rocks pirates!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's going on?! What was that terrible shriek?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'll have them take the kid!!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Violent Past through 31 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
